title: RepoLens Finding
description: Schema for a single finding emitted by RepoLens.

category.description: Rule category (e.g. secrets, files, docs, security, workflows, quality)

file.description: File path parsed from the finding location (null if no location was reported)

line.description: Line number parsed from the finding location (null if no line was reported or it could not be parsed)

column.description: Column number, currently always null. Reserved for forward compatibility.

description.description: Detailed description of the issue (null if not provided)

remediation.description: Suggested remediation steps (null if not provided)

project.description: Name (or path) of the scanned project, sourced from AuditResults.repository_name
